landing_how_subtitle: We flag missing replies, send personalized nudges, and keep every lead’s status up to date.
landing_how_step1_desc: Connect WhatsApp and CRM signals so every conversation flows into a single inbox.
landing_how_step2_desc: Spot hot leads, overdue replies, and suggested next steps automatically.

landing_how_step3_stats: Recover up to 78% of missed leads

landing_results_subtitle: Based on real data from 50+ clinics
landing_results_card1_subtitle: Out of 1,284 customers flagged for follow-up
landing_results_card3_subtitle: Time staff save on manual follow-up
landing_testimonial1_text: The system brought back 15 customers in the first month! The extra revenue covered the system cost 3x over.
landing_testimonial2_text: Huge time saver. Instead of sending messages manually, the system does everything automatically—and we just enjoy the results.
landing_faq_subtitle: Clear answers on setup, integrations, billing, and support.
landing_faq_side_subtitle: Our team helps you launch fast and optimize your follow-up flows from day one.
landing_faq_a1: Most clinics go live in less than 30 minutes. We connect your channels, map your statuses, and activate your first automation in one session.
landing_faq_a2: Yes. You can edit templates, adjust timing by day, and personalize messages with patient details so communication still feels human.
landing_faq_q3: Does it work with WhatsApp Business?
landing_faq_a3: Yes. The platform is built for WhatsApp Business workflows and keeps conversations organized in one shared inbox.
landing_faq_q4: What happens when a patient replies?
landing_faq_a4: Replies are detected in real time, lead status is updated automatically, and your team gets notified to continue the conversation quickly.
landing_faq_a5: Yes. There are no long-term commitments. You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel based on your clinic's needs.
landing_cta_subtitle: Join clinics growing revenue with consistent follow-up
landing_pricing_title: Choose the plan that fits your clinic
landing_pricing_subtitle: Start free, scale when you’re ready. All plans include secure WhatsApp automation, smart follow-ups, and analytics.
landing_footer_description: Smart patient recovery and lead management for modern clinics
landing_footer_cta_subtitle: Talk with our team about automation, onboarding, and integrations. We’ll reply within one business day.
landing_footer_cta_note: We also support WhatsApp and SMS follow-ups.
landing_footer_subtitle: Talk with our team about automation, onboarding, and integrations. We'll reply within one business day.
landing_footer_support_note: We also support WhatsApp and SMS follow-ups.
landing_footer_contact_description: Call, email, or visit us and we’ll walk you through onboarding.
landing_footer_copyright: © 2025 Lead Management System. All rights reserved.
landing_faq_q6: How fast can we reactivate lost patients?
landing_faq_a6: Most clinics see reactivations within the first 2-3 weeks because automations start the same day and escalate with reminders.
landing_faq_q7: Do you integrate multiple clinics under one account?
landing_faq_a7: Yes, multi-clinic groups can manage all branches in one workspace, with per-branch reporting and permissions.
landing_faq_q8: What metrics can we track on messages?
landing_faq_a8: You can monitor send volume, replies, hot leads created, recovered revenue, and per-channel performance across any time range.
